summary: All four requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 (rename 'Profile Settings' to 'Settings' in hamburger menu) is confirmed by the Header.tsx file summary. REQ-2 (new 'Collectibles' tab rendering NFTGallery) is confirmed by the new CollectiblesView.tsx, App.tsx changes, and Header.tsx changes. REQ-3 (remove NFTGallery from ProfileSettingsModal while keeping Mint Settings) is confirmed by ProfileSettingsModal.tsx which no longer imports NFTGallery and retains mint settings logic. REQ-4 (rename 'BUZZ' tab to 'Leaderboard') is confirmed by the Header.tsx file summary mentioning 'Leaderboard' replacing 'BUZZ'.
